name: Shrimp and Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound jumbo shrimp, cooked and diced
1 can (8 oz.) sliced water chestnuts, cut into halves
1 package (10 oz.) frozen small green peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and dice jumbo shrimp.
2. Cook the converted rice.
3. Finely chop celery, green onion, and green peppers.
4. Cut water chestnuts into halves and thaw frozen peas.
5. Combine the cooked shrimp, rice, chopped vegetables, water chestnuts, and thawed peas in a bowl.
6. In a separate bowl, mix mayonnaise, soy sauce, and curry powder (if using).
7. Stir the mixture of mayonnaise, soy sauce, and curry powder into the combined ingredients from step 5.
8. Cover the bowl and chill until ready to serve.
9. Serve on green leafy lettuce. Serves 6-8.
